name: stream_alert_denoise
description: Streaming-friendly HTTP alert deduplication pipeline: supports syslog real-time single alerts, alerts list, or alert_file path. Normalizes (TDP/Skyeye auto-detection, mixed batches) -> filters (remove scans / non-HTTP) -> deduplicates (URI normalization + 5-gram Jaccard MinHash LSH). Each output alert carries the full normalized fields plus dedup annotation: dedup_key (MD5), is_duplicate (cross-batch), _lsh_cluster_id, _source_type, _process_type. Results appended to JSONL files: ~/.flocks/workspace/workflows/stream_alert_denoise/<YYYY-MM-DD>/dedup_result_NNN.jsonl (max 10,000 records per file; each file starts with a timestamp header line).
